common.cooldown.en-US: Please wait {0}s before using this command again.
common.cooldown.zh-CN: 请等待 {0} 秒后再使用此命令。

poop.must_be_alive.en-US: You must be alive to use this command.
poop.must_be_alive.zh-CN: 你必须活着才能使用此命令。

poop.must_be_on_ground.en-US: {{red}}You must be on the ground to spawn poop!
poop.must_be_on_ground.zh-CN: {{red}}你必须站在地面上才能拉便便！

poop.max_per_round.zh-CN: {{red}}已达到本轮最大便便数量限制！

poop.spawned_on_player.zh-CN: {{darkred}}{0}{{default}} 在 {{blue}}{1}{{default}} 身上拉了一坨 {2} 便便 ({{green}}{3:F3}{{default}})！

poop.spawned_self.en-US: You spawned a {0} poop ({{green}}{1:F3}{{default}}) at your position!
poop.spawned_self.zh-CN: 你在自己的位置生成了一坨 {0} 便便 ({{green}}{1:F3}{{default}})！

poop.spawned_massive.en-US: {{gold}}WOW! {{darkred}}{0}{{default}} just dropped a {1} poop of size {{green}}{2:F3}{{default}}!
poop.spawned_massive.zh-CN: {{gold}}哇！{{darkred}}{0}{{default}} 刚拉了一坨 {1} 的便便，大小为 {{green}}{2:F3}{{default}}！

leaderboard.victim_total_count.en-US: {{blue}}{0}{{default}} has been pooped on {{green}}{1}{{default}} times total!

color.set_rainbow.en-US: {{green}}Your poop color has been set to {{gold}}Rainbow Mode 🌈{{green}}!
color.set_rainbow.zh-CN: {{green}}你的便便颜色已设置为 {{gold}}彩虹模式 🌈{{green}}！

color.set_rainbow_info.en-US: {{lightblue}}Your poops will now cycle through all colors!
color.set_rainbow_info.zh-CN: {{lightblue}}你的便便现在会循环所有颜色！

color.set_random.en-US: {{green}}Your poop color has been set to {{gold}}Random Mode 🎲{{green}}!
color.set_random.zh-CN: {{green}}你的便便颜色已设置为 {{gold}}随机模式 🎲{{green}}！

color.set_random_info.en-US: {{lightblue}}Each poop will be a random color!

color.set_normal.en-US: {{green}}Your poop color has been set to {0}{{green}}!
